page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8i.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at 2.7 GHz. This instance features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing a total of 8 vCPUs. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, which equates to a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include any bundled local storage, requiring the attachment of external block storage volumes for operating system and application data. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance type, and it does not feature any GPU acceleration.

With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is structured for compute-intensive workloads where processing power is prioritized over large memory footprints. The dedicated core allocation ensures consistent CPU performance without resource contention. This hardware profile is suitable for workloads such as web serving, batch processing, and compute-bound applications that do not require local storage or high memory capacities.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8i.2xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor operating at 2.7 GHz. The server features 8 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, delivering 8 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM. This configuration establishes a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, providing 2.0 GB of memory per core. Running on a KVM hypervisor, the instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on external network storage. It offers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation makes this instance suitable for compute-heavy tasks, batch processing, and web serving workloads that require stable processing performance without the overhead of hyperthreading or the need for massive memory allocations.
